assignments.name: phone55

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.`lista_leads`
  WHERE `phone`=$1 AND `ctwa` IS NOT NULL AND `ctwa`<>'null'
ORDER BY `datetime_last` DESC
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: Verificar n mero no whats app

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO {{ $json.db_name }}.`lista_leads` (
  `date`,
  nome,
  phone,
  utm_source,
  utm_campaign,
  utm_medium,
  utm_term,
  utm_content,
  utm_urlcompleta,
  utm_referring,
  ctwa
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.body.date_time.toDateTime().format("yyyy-MM-dd") }}',
  '{{ $json.body.data.pushName.toLowerCase().replaceSpecialChars().replace(/\'/g,"").replace(/\"/g,"") }}',
  '{{ $json.phone55 }}',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.conversionSource || "Ads" }}',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.externalAdReply?.ref || "ad" }}',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.externalAdReply?.sourceType || "" }}',
  '',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.externalAdReply?.title || "" }}',
  'https://alepinon.com/',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.externalAdReply?.sourceUrl || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.body?.data?.contextInfo?.externalAdReply?.ctwaClid || "" }}'
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  datetime_last = NOW(),
  `date` = COALESCE(VALUES(`date`), `date`),
  nome = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(nome), ''), nome),
  utm_source = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_source), ''), utm_source),
  utm_campaign = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_campaign), ''), utm_campaign),
  utm_medium = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_medium), ''), utm_medium),
  utm_term = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_term), ''), utm_term),
  utm_content = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_content), ''), utm_content),
  utm_urlcompleta = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_urlcompleta), ''), utm_urlcompleta),
  utm_referring = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(utm_referring), ''), utm_referring),
  ctwa = CASE
    WHEN ctwa IS NULL OR ctwa = '' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(ctwa), ''), ctwa)
    ELSE ctwa
  END;

main.node: Verificar n mero no whats app
